001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
004import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
006
007/**
008 * Represents a button element.
009 */
010public class Button extends LabeledRect<Button> {
011    /**
012     * Create a new button element.
013     *
014     * @param key Unique identifier for element
015     */
016    public Button(@NotNull String key) {
017        this(Key.of(key));
018    }
019
020    /**
021     * Create a new button element.
022     *
023     * @param key Unique identifier for element
024     */
025    public Button(@NotNull Key key) {
026        super(key, Type.BUTTON);
027    }
028
029    /**
030     * Create a new button element.
031     *
032     * @param key Unique identifier
033     * @return New button element
034     */
035    @NotNull
036    public static Button of(@NotNull String key) {
037        return of(Key.of(key));
038    }
039
040    /**
041     * Create a new button element.
042     *
043     * @param key Unique identifier
044     * @return New button element
045     */
046    @NotNull
047    public static Button of(@NotNull Key key) {
048        return new Button(key);
049    }
050
051    @Override
052    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
053        return super.equals(obj);
054    }
055
056    @Override
057    public int hashCode() {
058        // pacifies codefactor.io
059        return super.hashCode();
060    }
061}
